prompts: Cinematic shot in a Japanese fantasy demon castle corridor with warm torchlight and gothic office decor. A feminine dungeon warden, Zeno Ironclerk 049, in a neat dark uniform with a key ring, politely but firmly guides a masculine captured hero intern, Zeno Shadehall 089, who wears scuffed bright adventurer clothes and a practice sword tag, by his shoulder. Workplace comedy mood, no gore, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous corridor shot, maintaining identical lighting and characters. The captured hero intern, Zeno Shadehall 089, walks reluctantly alongside the dungeon warden, Zeno Ironclerk 049, who gestures firmly toward a stack of paperwork on a gothic desk checkpoint. Safe escort, comic tension, no gore, no text, no watermark.
